creator: robbak@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 247880
Meson build log file

This port does not build when the SpiderMonkey javascript backend is selected. Apparent reason is that it is looking for mozjs version 1.15, but there isn't a port for that version.

Build using the default Duktape javascript backend works fine.

Build log:
